Philosophy: The economy of Light and Shadow is fully player-driven, designed to support item circulation, capital safety through banking layers, and clean gold-sink mechanisms to control inflation.

CanonicalRules.Text: The economy operates through hybrid trade channels combining direct trade, manual exchange, and a global asynchronous market.
Secure trade uses a protected confirmation window requiring approval from both participants.
The game supports unprotected manual item exchange that carries theft and betrayal risk.
All city markets are globally connected and share the same listing pool.
Listed items are removed from player inventory and held by the market until sold or cancelled.
Market listings use fixed-price instant purchases and do not support bidding or auction systems.
An upfront non-refundable listing fee of 2% of the listing price is charged when an item is listed on the market.
Market listings remain active indefinitely until sold or manually cancelled.
Cancelled listings return the item to the player's depot while market fees remain permanently consumed.
All items in the game are fully tradable across all trade channels.
Gold from successful market sales is transferred directly into the character bank.
Only currency physically carried by the character is subject to death loss.
Currency stored in the character bank is fully protected from all death penalties.
Trade systems must preserve player-driven economy while maintaining meaningful social interaction and economic risk.

DirectSecureTrade.Mechanics: Two-phase confirmation. Any alteration of offered items or currency resets all confirmation checks back to unapproved status.

ManualTrade.Mechanics: Items are dropped directly onto the ground. Highly emergent, carries high theft risk and friendly/unfriendly betrayal.

GlobalMarket.Mechanics: Connected via Deposit/Depot (DP) lockers in all major cities. All hubs display the exact same active listings.

MarketRules.PricingModel: Fixed gold price only. No bidding or dynamic countdown auctions.
MarketRules.PhysicalHolding: Listed items leave player backpacks immediately and are transferred to market vault storage. They are no longer on the character.

ListingFee.DesignIntent: Deflationary gold sink. Discourages spam listings.

MarketRules.CancellationPenalty: Listing fee is lost permanently, and the item must be manually retrieved from the local city market depot.

ItemRestrictions.TradeRestrictionRule: All items, including boss drops, materials, and end-game gear are fully tradable. No items are systemically locked to a single character.

MarketRules.PayoutMechanic: Transferred directly into the character bank database. No physical gold drop risk upon purchase completion.

CarriedCurrency.Definition: Gold, silver, bronze, copper carried in the player's immediate pouch.
CarriedCurrency.LossOnDeath: Subject to the standard linear loss formula based on active blessings.

BankedCurrency.Definition: Stored in secure bank accounts in cities.
BankedCurrency.LossOnDeath: 0% loss under all death scenarios. 100% protection guarantee.
